sent_simp: 父母不能听任孩子整天玩游戏。
sent_trad: 父母不能聽任孩子整天玩遊戲。
pinyin: Fùmǔ bù néng tīngrèn háizi zhěng tiān wán yóuxì.
english: Parents cannot allow children to play games all day.

sent_simp: 合同里有一条条文他没看清楚。
sent_trad: 合同裡有一條條文他沒看清楚。
pinyin: Hétong lǐ yǒu yī tiáo tiáowén tā méi kàn qīngchǔ.
english: There was one clause in the contract that he didn't read clearly.

sent_simp: 孙武是中国历史上著名的军事家。
sent_trad: 孫武是中國歷史上著名的軍事家。
pinyin: Sūn Wǔ shì Zhōngguó lìshǐ shàng zhùmíng de jūnshìjiā.
english: Sun Wu (Sun Tzu) is a famous military strategist in Chinese history.

sent_simp: 他把闲置的旧书拿去卖钱了。
sent_trad: 他把閒置的舊書拿去賣錢了。
pinyin: Tā bǎ xiánzhì de jiù shū ná qù màiqián le.
english: He sold his idle old books to make some money.

sent_simp: 这款网络应用用起来非常方便。
sent_trad: 這款網絡應用用起來非常方便。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn wǎngluò yìngyòng yòng qǐlái fēicháng fāngbiàn.
english: This network application is very easy to use.

sent_simp: 他去南亚旅游了一个月。
sent_trad: 他去南亞旅遊了一個月。
pinyin: Tā qù Nányà lǚyóu le yīgè yuè.
english: He traveled in South Asia for a month.

sent_simp: 几位政府大员出席了开幕式。
sent_trad: 幾位政府大員出席了開幕式。
pinyin: Jǐ wèi zhèngfǔ dàyuán chūxí le kāimùshì.
english: Several senior government officials attended the opening ceremony.

sent_simp: 他被公司外派到新加坡工作。
sent_trad: 他被公司外派到新加坡工作。
pinyin: Tā bèi gōngsī wàipài dào Xīnjiāpō gōngzuò.
english: He was sent by his company to work in Singapore.

sent_simp: 你可以在网站主页找到联系方式。
sent_trad: 你可以在網站主頁找到聯繫方式。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ zài wǎngzhàn zhǔyè zhǎodào liánxì fāngshì.
english: You can find the contact information on the website's home page.

sent_simp: 这两条路在这里交叉。
sent_trad: 這兩條路在這裡交叉。
pinyin: Zhè liǎng tiáo lù zài zhèlǐ jiāochā.
english: These two roads intersect here.

sent_simp: 律师正在起草合同文件。
sent_trad: 律師正在起草合同文件。
pinyin: Lǜshī zhèngzài qǐcǎo hétong wénjiàn.
english: The lawyer is drawing up the contract documents.

sent_simp: 请参照说明书安装这台洗衣机。
sent_trad: 請參照說明書安裝這台洗衣機。
pinyin: Qǐng cānzhào shuōmíngshū ānzhuāng zhè tái xǐyījī.
english: Please refer to the instruction manual to install this washing machine.

sent_simp: 那位警官帮我们找到了丢失的钱包。
sent_trad: 那位警官幫我們找到了丟失的錢包。
pinyin: Nà wèi jǐngguān bāng wǒmen zhǎodào le diūshī de qiánbāo.
english: That police officer helped us find the lost wallet.

sent_simp: 迄今为止，这个问题还没有得到解决。
sent_trad: 迄今為止，這個問題還沒有得到解決。
pinyin: Qìjīn wéizhǐ, zhège wèntí hái méiyǒu dédào jiějué.
english: So far, this problem has not yet been resolved.

sent_simp: 中国队在世锦赛上成功夺冠。
sent_trad: 中國隊在世錦賽上成功奪冠。
pinyin: Zhōngguó duì zài Shìjǐnsài shàng chénggōng duóguàn.
english: The Chinese team successfully won the championship at the World Championships.

sent_simp: 餐厅收了服务费，另加了税。
sent_trad: 餐廳收了服務費，另加了稅。
pinyin: Cāntīng shōu le fúwùfèi, lìngjiā le shuì.
english: The restaurant charged a service fee with tax added on top.

sent_simp: 他气急了，骂了一句婊子。
sent_trad: 他氣急了，罵了一句婊子。
pinyin: Tā qì jí le, mà le yī jù biǎozi.
english: He was furious and hurled the insult '婊子' (whore).

sent_simp: 这是一场群众性的文化活动。
sent_trad: 這是一場群眾性的文化活動。
pinyin: Zhè shì yī chǎng qúnzhòngxìng de wénhuà huódòng.
english: This is a mass cultural event.

sent_simp: 昨晚的暴雨把院子里的花都打倒了。
sent_trad: 昨晚的暴雨把院子裡的花都打倒了。
pinyin: Zuówǎn de bàoyǔ bǎ yuànzi lǐ de huā dōu dǎdǎo le.
english: Last night's rainstorm knocked over all the flowers in the yard.

sent_simp: 他们举杯向老师致敬。
sent_trad: 他們舉杯向老師致敬。
pinyin: Tāmen jǔ bēi xiàng lǎoshī zhìjìng.
english: They raised their glasses to pay tribute to their teacher.
